backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing a community platform with user profiles (including location), posts with moderation workflow (pending/approved/rejected status), role-based access control, and migration support for upgrading from old schema.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old actor state (users without location, posts without IDs/status) to new schema by adding location field to users, assigning sequential IDs to posts, and setting all posts to pendingReview status.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: location selection in registration/profile editing, moderation interface for post approval/rejection, filtering community feed to approved posts only, and displaying user location on profiles.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, moderation queue with status tabs, location-aware user profiles, post creation/editing forms, authentication guards, and React Query hooks for backend integration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining warm, earthy orange-brown theme variables for both light and dark modes with proper contrast ratios.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the KYN application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for feed, profile, profile editing, post creation, and moderation, wrapped in ThemeProvider with toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that checks for Internet Identity login and displays a login prompt card with loading states for unauthenticated users before allowing access to protected content.
frontend/src/components/CommunityFeed.ts: Community feed component displaying approved posts with optional moderator toggle (for admins) to show post status badges, including loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostForm.t: Post creation form with textarea, character counter, validation, and submission handling that creates posts in pending review status with toast notifications for success/error states.
Form component for editing user profile (username and location) with validation, loading states, and navigation to profile page on success.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with gradient background, platform description, and conditional CTA button (login or create post) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with sticky header, responsive navigation (desktop/mobile), authentication controls, social media links in footer, and admin moderation access.
frontend/src/components/ModerationPostCa: Card component displaying a post in moderation queue with status badge, author info, timestamp, and approve/reject action buttons for moderators.
Tabbed interface for moderators to view and manage posts by status (pending, approved, rejected) with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying a post with author avatar, timestamp, content, and optional status badge.
frontend/src/components/RegisterForm.tsx: User registration form for new users to set username and location with validation and success toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/UserProfile.tsx: Displays a user profile card with avatar, username, location, post count, and a list of the user's posts. Includes an edit button for the authenticated user viewing their own profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance based on authentication state, initializing access control with admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating data including community feed, user profiles, posts, admin status, and post moderation operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for consistent design tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePost.tsx: Page component that displays either a registration form for new users or a post creation form for registered users, wrapped in an authentication guard.
frontend/src/pages/EditProfile.tsx: Simple page component that renders the EditProfileForm within an authentication guard and centered container.
frontend/src/pages/Feed.tsx: Landing page displaying a hero section followed by the community feed of posts with a title and description.
frontend/src/pages/Moderation.tsx: Admin-only page that displays the moderation queue for reviewing posts, with access control checking and appropriate error messages for non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: Page component that extracts userId from route parameters and renders the UserProfile component for that user.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system with custom colors using OKLCH color space, typography, container settings, animations, and theme extensions for the KYN platform.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting KYN (Know Your Neighbor) as a free speech social media platform with existing features including user authentication, post creation, community feed, user profiles, moderation interface, and location-based functionality.
